rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same three scope problems (bundling, vacuous IsUnipotent, True stubs), but Review 2 is more precise and actionable: it cites specific roadmap text, names concrete counterexamples (μ_p, αₚ), and catches an additional nuance that IsUnipotent is defined on GroupLike rather than the correct points type AlgPoints, all confirmed against the diff.
